harbor is the command-line entry point for the Harbor agent runtime SDK.

Subcommands fall into three groups:

  Local dev loop      dev, scaffold, validate
  Run inspection      inspect-events, inspect-runs, inspect-topology
  Build information   version

Subcommands without a real implementation yet stub-fail with a
structured error pointing to the phase that will implement them. See
RFC-001-Harbor.md §8 for the settled subcommand surface and
docs/plans/README.md for the implementation schedule.

Usage:
  harbor [command]

Available Commands:
  dev              boot the local Runtime + Protocol server
  help             Help about any command
  inspect-events   tail or filter the event bus of a running Runtime (Phase 69)
  inspect-runs     list recent runs and inspect a run's trajectory (Phase 69)
  inspect-topology render a run's node graph as ASCII (Phase 70)
  scaffold         generate a new agent skeleton from a template
  validate         validate config / skills / agent definitions without booting
  version          print harbor semver, protocol version, and build hash

Flags:
  -h, --help    help for harbor
      --json    emit machine-readable JSON output instead of human-readable text
      --quiet   suppress informational output (errors still emit)

Use "harbor [command] --help" for more information about a command.
